context: after M7.11.x: shared mask surface (private Symbol on globalThis), per-realm Proxy-based override, arrow-function wrapper, UA spoof to Firefox 150
build: feat/m7.11-stealth-hook-v2 HEAD with: lazy-launch fix + cross-realm surface refactor + Proxy override + bound-arrow wrapper

main_world_acceptance.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10.15; rv:150.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/150.0
main_world_acceptance.verdict: ALL PASS — main-realm shape matches a clean native Firefox

iframe_realm_acceptance.verdict: ALL PASS — cross-realm pollution probe (Proxy instanceof) holds

diff_vs_stage4_after_m7_11.main_world_probes: unchanged — both stages pass main-realm acceptance
diff_vs_stage4_after_m7_11.iframe_realm_probes: stage4 FAIL (wrapper leak) → stage6 PASS (Proxy + arrow + bind)
diff_vs_stage4_after_m7_11.creepjs_stealth_pct: still 20% — not driven by hook shape
diff_vs_stage4_after_m7_11.resistance_extension: still a5507ef9 — different hash from stage4 d4ec0779, but still non-unknown

remaining_leaks_hypothesis: Error.stack depth: every fetch call inserts one extra stack frame from the wrapper. CreepJS often runs fetch and reads stack via (new Error()).stack from inside or via promise rejection traces.
WebDriver-protocol side-channels Camoufox does not patch: BiDi adds RemoteAgent classes / observers that may be probed via DevTools-style introspection.
Some indirectly detectable side-effect of the Proxy itself (cross-realm Proxy detection beyond instanceof, e.g. structuredClone behaviour).
Worker UA still exposes Camoufox: BiDi addPreloadScript does not reach workers; preset injection runs post-start and the first worker UA read still shows Camoufox/150.0.2-beta.25.
what_we_changed_this_pass: src/server/server.ts: lazy session.init — no longer block MCP initialize on Camoufox launch (committed 4299b58).

src/capabilities/stealthHook.ts: emitToStringMasking is now top-of-preload bootstrap; private Symbol on globalThis carries { maskAs, installInRealm }; sub-realm preload skips bootstrap and only installs local override.

src/capabilities/stealthHook.ts: buildOverrideIn uses target-realm Proxy(realFnToString, {apply, construct}) — gives `instanceof targetWin.Function === true` AND `prototype` absent AND `new override()` throws.

src/capabilities/stealthHook.ts: wrapper is now an arrow function with (...a) rest — no own `prototype`, not constructable. Tradeoff: `this` is no longer dynamically forwarded; OK for current wrap targets (fetch / XHR / WebSocket).
test/unit/capabilities/stealthHook.test.ts: updated single-install assertion to match the new shared-surface architecture.

next_milestones.M7.12 stack-mask: wrap fetch via Proxy at native-call boundary so the synchronous wrapper frame is excised from Error.stack
next_milestones.M7.13 worker-prestart-ua: investigate whether Camoufox preset or a BiDi sandbox lets us patch navigator.userAgent before the worker first reads it; otherwise document as unreachable
next_milestones.M7.14 stealth-extension-fingerprint: instrument CreepJS source to identify which exact probe produces a5507ef9; targeted fix

acceptance_summary: M7.11 + M7.11.x spec-level acceptance is met: every probe declared in plan §7 returns the expected value. CreepJS stealth%/extension fingerprint reflects additional probes that are out of scope for the stealthHook capability.
